creator: mark@markmcb.com
text:
Confirming this remains in 14.1-RELEASE-p4

I saw the recent bhyve change[1], which stated "MMIO handler for the emulated device did not validate the offset and size of the memory access correctly." I suspect something similar is at play for this SR-IOV bug.

1: https://www.freebsd.org/security/advisories/FreeBSD-SA-24:10.bhyve.asc
